title: Blockchain-Edge Security Framework for Industrial IoT Smart Spaces: Chaincode, Benchmark Harness, and Experimental Data
description:
Source code and raw experimental data supporting the paper "A Hardware-Validated Permissioned Blockchain-Edge Security Framework for Industrial IoT Smart Spaces" (submitted to IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics, 2026).

Includes: (1) the Hyperledger Fabric v2.4.9 chaincode implementing DID-based RegisterDevice(), AuthorizeUser(), and LogData() smart-contract functions; (2) the closed-loop and open-loop benchmark harness; (3) Tier 1 ESP32 device firmware and Tier 2 Raspberry Pi gateway pipeline reference implementations; and (4) raw CSV data reproducing all throughput, latency, scalability, ablation, and attack-validation results (Tables VII-XII, Figures 6-8).
